---
title: "Cambodia Elite Capture - Data Preparation"
author: "Jeffrey Stark"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: show
    embed-resources: true
---

# Load Wave 6 Data

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Load the ALREADY CLEANED Wave 6 data
data <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "w6_all_countries_merged.rds"))

# Filter to our three countries
# Note: country is a haven_labelled variable, use country_name instead
cambodia_trust <- data %>%
  filter(country_name %in% c("Cambodia", "Vietnam", "Thailand"))

# Check what trust variables we have
cat("Trust variables available:\n")
trust_vars <- grep("trust", names(cambodia_trust), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
print(trust_vars)

# Check sample sizes
cambodia_trust %>%
  group_by(country_name) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
```

# Next Steps

1. Check if we have all needed trust variables
2. If missing, update scripts/02_data_preparation.qmd to add them
3. Re-run scripts/02_data_preparation.qmd to update ab_analysis.rds
4. Continue with descriptive analysis
